app.name: AquaTwin
app.tagline: The digital twin for aquaponic farms

farm.newFarmDescription: The farm arrives with six sensors and six devices ready to go.
farm.createFailed: Could not create the farm. Please try again
farm.onboardingDescription: Your farm arrives with six sensors and six devices preconfigured and ready to monitor.

overview.deviceFailed: Could not update the device. Please try again

stub.constructionBody: It becomes available in a later phase

twin.title: Digital twin
twin.description: A live simulation of your farm

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Rules that act on your devices

dashboard.emptyHint: No readings yet. Use Generate 24 h history to fill the charts.

simulator.error: The simulator hit an error and stopped
simulator.scenariosDescription: Turning on a scenario makes that reading drift toward a critical level.

hero.label: Digital twin for aquaponics
hero.title: Your farm has a twin. It never sleeps.
hero.subtitle: AquaTwin mirrors your aquaponic system in real time, predicts critical shifts hours before they happen and acts while there is still time to save the fish and the harvest.
hero.prediction: Prediction: ammonia reaches warning level in 3 h 40 m

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Aquaponics is a fragile balance
problem.body: Fish, bacteria and plants share one water loop. A small shift in pH, temperature or ammonia can kill the entire stock within hours.
problem.stat1Label: from first deviation to fish loss
problem.stat3Label: of the stock at risk at once

how.label: How it works
how.title: From sensors to decisions
how.step1Body: Probes in the tank read water quality continuously and send every value to AquaTwin.
how.step2Body: A live digital copy holds the current state of every tank and every parameter.
how.step3Body: Models project where each parameter is heading and how soon it reaches a limit.
how.step4Body: Rules switch pumps, aeration and feeding before a threshold is ever crossed.

features.label: Features
features.title: One platform, four safety nets
features.monitoringBody: All six water metrics on one dashboard, updated the moment a sensor reports.
features.alertsBody: Warnings arrive hours before a critical level, each with a concrete recommendation.
features.simulationBody: Test feed, temperature or stocking changes on the twin before you touch the real farm.
features.automationBody: Rules that switch pumps, aeration, feeding and light without a human in the loop.

cta.title: Lose alerts, not fish
cta.body: Set up your first digital twin in minutes and let AquaTwin watch the water while you focus on growing.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.user_already_exists: An account with this email already exists
errors.weak_password: Choose a stronger password with at least 8 characters
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again
errors.network: Network problem. Check your connection and try again
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again

notice.checkInbox: Check your inbox to confirm the address before signing in

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Threshold breaches and forecasts for your farm

recommendations.generic: Review this parameter and adjust the system.
recommendations.ammonia_high: Increase filtration and pause feeding until levels drop.
recommendations.dissolved_oxygen_low: Turn on the aerator and check the main pump.
recommendations.ph_low: Dose pH buffer gradually and retest.
recommendations.ph_high: Dose pH buffer gradually and retest.
recommendations.water_temp_low: Turn on the heater and reduce ventilation.
recommendations.nitrite_high: Do a partial water exchange and check the biofilter.
recommendations.nitrate_high: Harvest greens or exchange part of the water.

twin.description: A live mirror of your farm and a what if sandbox
twin.selectHint: Select a node to see its details
twin.disclaimer: This is a projection on the twin. It changes nothing on the real farm.
twin.runHint: Adjust the controls and run a projection
twin.allStable: The system stays within safe ranges for the whole horizon

settings.description: Manage your account, farm and thresholds
settings.thresholdsHint: Edit the warning and critical bounds for each sensor
settings.thresholdInvalid: Check the bounds. Lows must sit below highs and criticals outside warnings
settings.saveFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again
settings.languageHint: The language choice is saved on this device
settings.dangerHint: Deleting a farm removes all of its sensors, readings, alerts and rules
settings.deleteFarmBody: This removes the farm {{name}} and everything in it. Type the farm name to confirm.
